note: Registry of Axiom Canon publications. The Canon (this repository's chapter files) is authoritative. Every publication derived from the Canon is logged here for provenance and tracking. See README.md, 'Publication editions'.

classes.faithful-rendering: A portable reformatting of the Canon that must stay faithful to its principal ideas: it introduces no new principal claim, drops none, and is edited as one unit with the Canon. On divergence, the Canon wins.
classes.derivative: An interpretation, expansion, essay, or talk built from the Canon. Free to interpret, reframe, and expand; not required to match the Canon. Logged here only for tracking and provenance, recording the Canon version it derives from.

last_reconciled.method: owner-directed sync in session; canon and monograph edited as one unit
